name: Where Doom Awaits
intro_text: You have pieced together the truth: a gate is being opened atop Sentinel Hill — the same hill where the Whateley family once performed their terrible rites.
The cultists are already ascending. If they complete the ritual at the summit, Yog-Sothoth will pass through, and nothing in this world will stop it. You must reach the top first.
setup_instructions: Investigators begin at the Base of the Hill.
Act 2 locations (Dimensional Gap, Tear in the Path, Uprooted Woods, Lost Memories) are placed face-down — they appear when Act 2 begins.
Randomly select which Act 1 hill locations are used this scenario per rulebook.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — The gate is sealed
text: You reach the summit and, with every ounce of your remaining strength, seal the gate before Yog-Sothoth can fully cross over. The sky above Dunwich darkens, then clears.
Record in the campaign log: *The gate was sealed.* Each investigator earns 3 bonus XP.

defeat.label: Defeat — The gate opens
text: The cultists complete the rite. The gate tears open atop Sentinel Hill, and through it comes something vast and incomprehensible — the Lurker at the Threshold itself.
Record in the campaign log: *The gate was opened.* Proceed to Lost in Time and Space under the worst possible conditions.
